Values are how we work, not just what we say. Reflect on how you demonstrated each one this quarter.

🎯

01 · Ownership

Mission first, resourcefulness always. Owners optimise for long-term outcomes, bridge gaps in the org, and act beyond their job description. Customer & Pro obsession is non-negotiable.

Mission FirstResourcefulnessCustomer & Pro Obsessed
Manager Assessment
⚡

02 · Passion

We are optimistic about the future and stay so when faced with adversity. Champions put every ounce of energy into excellence — and make magic happen through belief and craftsmanship.

Optimistic about the FutureChampion's HeartMake Magic
Manager Assessment
🌟

03 · Good Vibes

Bring positive energy into every shift, call, and interaction. Wins must be celebrated — and we care deeply for each other, treating everyone with respect regardless of background.

SuperpumpedCelebrate the WinsCare
Manager Assessment
💡

04 · First Principles & Innovation

Seek foundational truths, take big bold bets, and let the best idea win. Fight conventional wisdom with logic — speak truth to power, and if in power, listen.

Seeking Foundational TruthsBig Bold BetsBest Ideas Win
